description: Off-book VIP remediation credits (GR-008) + dual-track fulfillment (GR-002) = ICFR material weakness. Two independent control failures converge on the same audit assertion.
litigation_text: The combination of off-book VIP host credits and dual-track fulfillment systems creates an ICFR material weakness under SOX 404(b) that BDO cannot certify without qualification, triggering the audit withdrawal cascade documented in GR-011.
